seo.title: smyst.com | AI Twins, Digital Profiles and Twin Chat
seo.description: smyst.com is a platform for public and private AI twins, knowledge, memories and fast twin chats.
seo.keywords: AI twin, digital twin, knowledge profile, memories, smyst

start.emptyText: Choose a name above or start writing. The selected twin stays fixed in the top right.
start.freeOnlyNotice: Public and private profiles stay clearly separated. You choose who you want to chat with.

chat.replyMvp: I would look at it calmly: the world is full of speed, knowledge, and unrest at the same time.
chat.replyNextStep: What matters is to observe carefully, stay curious, and connect progress with responsibility.
